pages.education.heading: My Learning Dashboard
pages.wallet.title: Wallet
pages.wallet.complianceBody: PLGD Credits are a limited-purpose digital balance. They are non-transferable, do not earn interest, and are not insured deposits.
pages.wallet.complianceItemDelay: Available credits exclude pending top ups for the first 48 hours to mitigate chargebacks.
pages.wallet.complianceItemLedger: Refunds create reversing ledger entries so that buyer, seller, and platform balances stay aligned.
pages.wallet.complianceItemSupport: Contact support@pluggd.io for ledger disputes. Statements are retained for statutory anti-money laundering audits.
pages.live.title: Live Battles, Showcases, and Creator Streams
pages.live.description: The energy of the culture in real-time. Submit, perform, and get feedback from the community.
pages.live.noSchedule: No live events scheduled yet. Check back soon!
pages.live.noRoomsDescription: Be the first to start a live session!
pages.messaging.title: Unified Inbox
pages.messaging.subtitle: Manage all your messages from YouTube, Discord, Gmail, and more in one place.
